narrative_beat: A ilusão se parte — o espelho dourado estilhaçado no chão, cada fragmento refletindo uma face de IA diferente, a verdade impossível de ignorar

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: top-down aerial looking straight down at shattered mirror on floor
shot.depth_of_field: all mirror pieces in focus, floor surface slightly soft

subject.primary: shattered ornate golden-framed baroque mirror lying face-up on floor, broken into multiple large and small pieces
subject.focal_point: the center largest piece reflecting a glowing biblical verse in golden light
subject.secondary: surrounding pieces each reflecting different AI-generated faces in crimson and amber, each a different deepfake identity
props: ornate golden mirror frame pieces with baroque carvings scattered
mirror shards each reflecting different AI faces
central largest shard with biblical verse glow
floating orange embers drifting above the shattered surface

environment.location: modern tech company corporate lobby with marble floor
environment.atmosphere: the collapse of the deception, reality forcing its way through the fractured artificial surface

composition.rule: aerial looking-down — shattered mirror filling entire frame, Ken Burns extremely slow downward push-in toward center shard
composition.foreground: shattered golden mirror pieces in warm crimson and amber tones scattered across frame
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white marble lobby floor — grout lines, stone texture, company logo barely visible at edge

lighting.key_light: golden glow emanating from the biblical verse reflected in the central shard, illuminating nearby pieces
lighting.fill_light: crimson reflections from the AI face shards providing overall warm ambient fill
lighting.rim_light: golden backlit glow along the frame pieces' baroque carved edges
lighting.mood: aftermath of revelation, the wreckage of lies exposed

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: catharsis and grief — the comfortable deception broken, truth costs something

symbolism.primary: the shattered mirror represents the moment when the deepfake illusion cannot be maintained — reality breaks through
symbolism.secondary: the corporate lobby setting implicates the tech industry as the manufacturer of these illusions

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
